mechanics.excerpt: GURRAGTER creatIoN LIFE PATH The Life Path is where your character takes shape_ By mak- ing choices and following the instructions for each choice, you lead your character through childhood schooling ad early career. Going through the Life Path not only gives you finished character but also puts you well on your way toward completing your character'= personal history: The Life Path is divided into four stages that represent dif- ferent parts of your character" life: Early Childhood Stage Late Childhood (Stage 21, Higher Education (Stage 3) and Real Life (Stage 4).
